ascii_heavy_candidates.source: To workaround a Maya limitation for solo-ing BXDFs, please use this RfM-centric hotkey for solo-ing MaterialX Lama nodes:
ascii_heavy_candidates.translation: 为绕过 Maya 在 solo-ing BXDFs 方面的限制，请使用这个以 RfM 为中心的 hotkey 来 solo MaterialX Lama nodes：

ascii_heavy_candidates.source: MaterialX Lama is a state of the art material layering system developed at Industrial Light & Magic that introduces a modular approach to building material networks and includes recent shading R&D work on energy conservation and dispersion.
ascii_heavy_candidates.translation: MaterialX Lama 是由 Industrial Light & Magic 开发的先进 material layering system；它引入模块化方式来构建 material networks，并纳入近期关于 energy conservation 和 dispersion 的 shading R&D 工作。

ascii_heavy_candidates.source: The MaterialX Lama project represents ongoing R&D into materials at ILM, and represents one facet of the larger MaterialX project.
ascii_heavy_candidates.translation: MaterialX Lama project 代表 ILM 对 materials 的持续 R&D，也是更大 MaterialX project 的一个方面。

ascii_heavy_candidates.source: MaterialX Lama node composition also offers a simpler built-in mechanism for energy conservation and other properties, because of its fundamental focus on layering of physically based responses.
ascii_heavy_candidates.translation: MaterialX Lama node composition 也提供更简单的内置机制来处理 energy conservation 和其他 properties，因为它从根本上专注于 physically based responses 的 layering。
